calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Jill Bates-Moore Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Mary Voss.
Declaration of Andy Min pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Request to dimisss Does 1-10 granted. Counsel for plaintiff to file a dismissal.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC and against Defendant Mary Voss as follows:

Principal $9,288.04
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $383.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $9671.04
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., 510.985.9250, for plaintiff Midland Funding LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court GRANTS PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not Reported.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
